final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 9-grid Xiaohongshu (小红书) cover image for a personal media account.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" (amateur/authentic creator) aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s Tumblr soft girl visual culture, Sanrio kawaii illustration heritage, early-2020s Xiaohongshu creator thumbnails; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9-grid layout, centered title placement
Subject: must include DJI Pocket 4 product as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, friendly atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cute direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (large, centered, cute and differentiated typography)
Constraints: must be 9-grid structure, must read as Xiaohongshu cover format
Avoid:
